name: Tanglin Trust School
tagline: The oldest British international school in Southeast Asia
description: Tanglin Trust School is the oldest British international school in Southeast Asia, founded in 1925. Located in the leafy Portsdown Road area near one-north, Tanglin provides a British-based education for children aged 3 to 18. The school follows the English National Curriculum, leading to IGCSEs in Years 10-11, followed by either A-Levels or the IB Diploma in Sixth Form. Tanglin is known for its strong pastoral care, excellent academic results, and a tight-knit community feel that comes from its long history and deep roots in Singapore.

admission.process: Applications are accepted year-round for most year groups. Families submit an online application with supporting documents. Assessments and interviews are conducted to ensure the school is a good fit for the child.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions throughout the year. Recommended to apply 12 months in advance for popular year groups.
admission.assessmentInfo: Entrance assessment in English and Mathematics, plus an interview. Nursery and Reception assessments are play-based.
priorityGroups: British passport holders (as per school's British mandate)

faqs.question: What curriculum does Tanglin Trust follow?
faqs.answer: Tanglin follows the English National Curriculum from Nursery to Year 9, leading to IGCSEs (Years 10-11), then a choice of A-Levels or the IB Diploma (Years 12-13).

faqs.question: Are there school fees discounts?
faqs.answer: Tanglin offers a sibling discount for the third and subsequent children. The school is a registered charity; fees cover the cost of operating the school without profit.

faqs.question: Is Tanglin Trust only for British students?
faqs.answer: While Tanglin has a British foundation and mandate, it welcomes students of all nationalities. The student body represents over 50 nationalities, though British students make up the largest cohort.

faqs.question: How much are the school fees at Tanglin Trust?
faqs.answer: Annual fees for 2025/2026 range from approximately SGD 28,450 (Nursery) to SGD 47,800 (Sixth Form), divided into three terms.

seo.title: Tanglin Trust School — British International School Singapore | EduAtlas
seo.description: Tanglin Trust School: Oldest British international school in Singapore (founded 1925) for ages 3-18. IGCSE, A-Levels and IB Diploma. View fees, admission and curriculum.
